name: local-agent-bridge
description: Bridge VS Code Chat requests to local Qwen, Aider, and Cline workflows.

chatParticipants.name: local
chatParticipants.description: Route a chat request to qwen, aider, or cline.

commands.name: qwen
commands.description: Run one-shot with local Qwen CLI.

commands.name: aider
commands.description: Run one-shot with local Aider CLI (safe ask mode by default).

commands.name: cline
commands.description: Open Cline and copy prompt to clipboard.

localAgentBridge.defaultProvider.description: Provider used when no slash command is given.

localAgentBridge.commandTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for local CLI commands in milliseconds.

localAgentBridge.qwenArgs.description: Extra args before the prompt for qwen.

localAgentBridge.aiderArgs.description: Base args for aider. Prompt is appended via --message.

localAgentBridge.aiderPromptPrefix.description: Prefix added before the aider message prompt.
